## octagonal-wheels 0.1.48

12th July, 2026

I have moved octagonal-wheels into the Fancy Kit monorepo while preserving its independent package and release history. The path contract has completed consumer preview review, and the byte-view contract has completed package review. This release begins the stable `0.1.48` line, with registry consumer validation to follow before `latest` promotion. The wheels are ready to roll from their new home.

### Added

- Portable relative-path validation and joining helpers.
- Exact byte-view helpers for binary values.

### Repository

- Updated package links and future npm provenance to the Fancy Kit monorepo.
- Kept the former standalone repository as a read-only migration signpost.
